name: Paddle (npx)
description: Interact with the Paddle Billing API to manage products, prices, customers, subscriptions, transactions, and reporting. Runs locally via npx.

inputs.label: Paddle API Key
inputs.description: Paddle Billing API key used to authenticate requests. Create one from your Paddle dashboard under Developer tools > Authentication. Use a sandbox key for the sandbox environment and a live key for production.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to your Paddle dashboard
2. Go to Developer tools > Authentication
3. Click 'New API key' (or use an existing key)
4. Copy the generated API key

Live keys: https://vendors.paddle.com/authentication-v2
Sandbox keys: https://sandbox-vendors.paddle.com/authentication-v2

inputs.label: Paddle Environment
inputs.description: Which Paddle environment to target. Must match the type of API key you provide.

auth.instructions: Create a Paddle API key in your dashboard under Developer tools > Authentication (https://vendors.paddle.com/authentication-v2 for live, https://sandbox-vendors.paddle.com/authentication-v2 for sandbox).
